aiSummary:
### GitHub Activity Summary for Universal Tuya Zigbee

#### New Device Requests
1. **Wenzhi Smart Human Presence Sensor & Relay**
   - **Fingerprint:** _TZE204_clrdrnya
   - **Driver:** motion_sensor_radar_mmwave
   - **Issue Link:** [Device Request - Wenzhi Smart Human Presence Sensor & Relay](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1142) (Open)

#### Supported Fingerprints
1. **Plug Energy Monitor**
   - **Fingerprint:** _TZ3210_w0qqde0g
   - **Driver:** plug_energy_monitor
   - **Issue Link:** [Plug Energy Monitor, wrong voltage](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/137) (Closed)

#### Fingerprints from Forks to Integrate
- No new fingerprints from forks were identified in the recent activity.

#### Pull Requests with Useful Changes
1. **Fix HOBEIAN 10G radar sensor: IAS motion conflict, battery read, DP corrections**
   - **Fingerprint:** _TZE200_rhgsbacq
   - **PR Link:** [Fix HOBEIAN 10G radar sensor](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/125) (Closed)

2. **Support for _TZ3000_ysdv91bk**
   - **Fingerprint:** _TZ3000_ysdv91bk
   - **PR Link:** [Support for _TZ3000_ysdv91bk](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/118) (Closed)

3. **Feature: Add support for Bseed 1-Gang Switch with physical button detection**
   - **Fingerprint:** _TZ3000_blhvsaqf
   - **PR Link:** [Add support for Bseed 1-Gang Switch](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/116) (Closed)

4. **Added separate driver for Tuya/Bseed touch dimmer**
   - **Fingerprints:** _TZE200_3p5ydos3, _TZE204_n9ctkb6j
   - **PR Link:** [Added separate driver for Tuya/Bseed touch dimmer](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/111) (Merged)

5. **Added _TZE204_n9ctkb6j, lower/upper case ID**
   - **Fingerprint:** _TZE204_n9ctkb6j
   - **PR Link:** [Added _TZE204_n9ctkb6j](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/106) (Merged)

6. **Make fingerbot (_TZ3210_j4pdtz9v) work**
   - **Fingerprint:** _TZ3210_j4pdtz9v
   - **PR Link:** [Make fingerbot work](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1065) (Open)

7. **Fixes RGB LED Strip Controller, _TZ3210_eejm8dcr / TS0505B**
   - **Fingerprint:** _TZ3210_eejm8dcr
   - **PR Link:** [Fix RGB LED Strip Controller](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1075) (Open)

8. **Added support for GIRIER Contact Sensor & Benexmart 12V RGBCW Dimmable Spotlight**
   - **Fingerprint:** _TZ3000_c8zfad4a
   - **PR Link:** [Added support for GIRIER Contact Sensor](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1137) (Open)

9. **Add support for Tuya PIR sensor TS0202 / "_TZ3000_c8ozah8n"**
   - **Fingerprint:** _TZ3000_c8ozah8n
   - **PR Link:** [Add support for Tuya PIR sensor](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1166) (Open)

10. **Addition of Garage Door Controller and combined Fan on/off, fan speed, Light on/off drivers**
    - **Fingerprints:** _TZE204_lawxy9e2, _TZE204_nklqjk62
    - **PR Link:** [Addition of Garage Door Controller](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1210) (Open)

This summary highlights the latest developments in device requests, supported fingerprints, and notable pull requests that could enhance the Universal Tuya Zigbee app. Please review the links for further details and consider contributing to the discussions or implementations.
